flags.concern: Planning workflow: The plan is stale and still blocks on collecting notes, even though the six bug notes and user decisions are already present in the plan state.
flags.evidence: Replaced the stale scaffold (which still blocked on 'collect notes') with a concrete six-step implementation plan derived from the user's notes and verified against the actual files. Added explicit static-verification gates for Bug 1 (DM context) and Bug 2 (5xx crash) — both promoted to `must` success criteria — to satisfy the critical requirement. Expanded Bug 3 scope from a single file to all four files where the dead Zapier code/text live (`social_poster.py`, `sharer.py`, `tools.py`, `agent.py`), addressing FLAG-002. Pinned every step to verified file:line references. Removed assumptions and questions that were already answered in the notes.
